sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: geonames-sy.zip
rawFiles.notes: Same GeoNames Syria country dump used by the rail and port expansion import.

transforms: Review GeoNames airport rows held by the first GeoNames transport import.
Accept only existing public airport records whose GeoNames row identity is clear from airport name and public airport codes.
Add GeoNames identifiers and dated source references to accepted airport records.
Keep ambiguous, duplicate-name, and military-looking airport rows out of the canonical dataset.
reviewNotes: Imported 6 GeoNames airport identifier enrichments for existing public airport records: Aleppo International Airport, Damascus International Airport, Deir ez-Zor Airport, Qamishli International Airport, Latakia International Airport, and Palmyra Airport. Held Khafr Bu at Tahta, Al Thaurah/SOR, and Mezzeh Military Airport for identity or safety review.
